summary: Performance Optimization Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed (100%), all 10 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified SQL JOINs optimization, pagination with window function, lazy loading tabs in RegistroForm, React.lazy code splitting, and eliminated duplicate API calls. No functional regressions detected.

issues: React hydration warning: <div> cannot be child of <table> - pre-existing issue from DndContext, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: SQL optimization verified: GET /api/registros uses COUNT(*) OVER() window function for pagination (line 71 registros_main.py)
SQL optimization verified: GET /api/registros/{id} uses JOINs for modelo_nombre, marca_nombre, tela_nombre, hilo_nombre (lines 149-170)
SQL optimization verified: GET /api/registros/{id}/materiales uses batch queries for disponibilidad (lines 1049-1067)
Lazy loading tabs verified: RegistroForm.jsx uses activeTab/tabsLoaded state to defer data fetching (lines 224-266)
Code splitting verified: App.js uses React.lazy for 50+ pages with LazyWrap component (lines 15-66)
Duplicate API call eliminated: RegistroForm.jsx no longer calls /api/modelos twice (line 213 uses cached modelos)
